basic_details.job_title: Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Uttarakhand Forest Department (https://forest.uk.gov.in). A total of 1 Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) vacancy has been announced through the Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years as on 01-04-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Science / Wildlife Sciences / Environmental Science / Forestry or equivalent professional diploma in forestry; Minimum 20 years of professional experience in forests, wildlife management, forest conservation and/or environmental governance, with at least 2 years in senior leadership/apex-level position.
qualification.details: Master's degree in Science / Wildlife Sciences / Environmental Science / Forestry from a recognised University or Institution or equivalent professional diploma in forestry. Minimum 20 years of professional experience in forests, wildlife management, forest conservation and/or environmental governance. At least 2 years service in senior leadership / apex-level position. Demonstrated experience and familiarity with forestry and wildlife context of Uttarakhand or Himalayan / hill forest States. Good working knowledge of relevant Central and State Acts, Rules and Regulations governing forestry and wildlife management. Excellent communication skills in Hindi and English.

selection_process: Preliminary scrutiny by screening cell Shortlisting by Selection Committee Interaction / interview / presentation before Selection Committee Marks-based evaluation Vigilance clearance
antecedent and document verification Recommendation and approval by competent authority
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://forest.uk.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Uttarakhand Forest Department Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree in Science / Wildlife Sciences / Environmental Science / Forestry from a recognised University or Institution or equivalent professional diploma in forestry. Minimum 20 years of professional experience in forests, wildlife management, forest conservation and/or environmental governance. At least 2 years service in senior leadership / apex-level position. Demonstrated experience and familiarity with forestry and wildlife context of Uttarakhand or Himalayan / hill forest States. Good working knowledge of relevant Central and State Acts, Rules and Regulations governing forestry and wildlife management. Excellent communication skills in Hindi and English.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years as on 01-04-2026.

content_sections.heading: Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

Age Limit as on Cut-off Date

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Preliminary scrutiny by screening cell Shortlisting by Selection Committee Interaction / interview / presentation before Selection Committee Marks-based evaluation Vigilance clearance, antecedent and document verification Recommendation and approval by competent authority

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://forest.uk.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Uttarakhand Forest Department Senior Consultant post?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) position is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the department by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Consultant role?
faq.answer: A Master's degree in Science, Wildlife Sciences, Environmental Science, or Forestry from a recognized university is required. An equivalent professional diploma in forestry is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 20 years of professional experience in forests, wildlife management, forest conservation, or environmental governance is mandatory. At least 2 years must be in a senior leadership or apex-level position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Consultant (Forestry & Wildlife) post is 65 years as of 1st April 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 2,00,000 to Rs. 2,25,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves preliminary scrutiny, shortlisting by a Selection Committee, an interview/presentation, marks-based evaluation, and verification of documents and antecedents.

faq.question: Q9. Does the department offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation for specific categories. The maximum age limit is 65 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Uttarakhand Forest Department: https://forest.uk.gov.in.
